What is the SBA 7(a) Loan Program?

Who is Eligible for SBA 7(a) Loans?

What are SBA 7(a) Loan Amounts & Terms?

  • Loans up to $150,000: 85% guarantee
  • Loans over $150,000: 75% guarantee
  • SBA Express: 50% guarantee
  • Standard: 10-20%
  • Business acquisition: 10-15%
  • Start-ups: May require 20-30%

What Can SBA 7(a) Loans Be Used For?

What are the Types of SBA 7(a) Loans?

How Do You Apply for an SBA 7(a) Loan?

Prepare Your Financials (2-4 weeks)

Find an SBA Lender

Submit Application Package

Lender Review & SBA Approval (2-8 weeks)

Closing & Funding

shortAnswer: To apply for SBA 7(a) Loans Complete Guide 2026, start by reviewing the eligibility criteria and preparing a project proposal. Complete guide to SBA 7(a) loans. Learn eligibility requirements, application process, terms, and how to secure up to $5M in SBA funding for your business. Funding available: up to $5M.
shortAnswerQuestion: How can my business apply for SBA 7(a) Loans Complete Guide 2026 in 2026?

faq.question: Is the SBA 7(a) a direct grant?
faq.answer: No. The SBA 7(a) is a loan guarantee program. The SBA doesn't lend you the money directly; instead, they guarantee up to 85% of a loan issued by an approved bank or credit union.

faq.question: What credit score do I need for an SBA 7(a) loan?
faq.answer: Most lenders look for a personal credit score of 680 or higher. However, the SBA itself does not set a strict minimum personal credit score; individual banks add their own overlays.

faq.question: Can I use an SBA 7(a) to buy another business?
faq.answer: Yes. In fact, business acquisition is one of the most common applications of the 7(a) loan, allowing entrepreneurs to buy existing, cash-flowing businesses with only 10% down.

expertTip.title: Use an SBA Lender
expertTip.content: Apply through an SBA Preferred Lender for faster processing. They can approve loans without SBA review, cutting weeks off approval time.
